action.reasoning: Observation: iter3 got only 0.0785 avg_acc (worse than iter2's 0.4653); model only predicts task0 classes well (0.785 on t0, 0 elsewhere), val acc stuck ~0.08, training curves flat. Analysis: replay update ran but Adam+CosineAnnealingLR without lr reset caused lr->0 after task0 (no learning on new tasks); code truncation in workspace but run completed so full file exists. Decision: fix by adding explicit optimizer lr reset to 1e-3 before each task, use memory_per_task=300 (balance rehearsal), epochs=8/task, keep Adam+Cosine with eta_min=1e-6, stronger augs, more frequent logging. Expect >0.5 avg_acc. Rewrite clean train.py (no truncation), keep model.py/predict.py, train then submit_eval.
